title: cleisostoma iloconense
intro: Cleisostoma iloconense is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the Iloilo cleisostoma. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma iloconense include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or decoction, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
